_doc: Suppressions for findings verified as false positives or intentional design decisions. Fingerprints come from finding-intelligence.js fingerprintFinding(). Patterns use regex matching against finding titles.

fingerprints.title: Write route lacks obvious auth guard: POST /verify
fingerprints.reason: POST /auth/verify is intentionally public — it validates Firebase ID tokens for debugging

fingerprints.title: Potential raw error leakage in redirectHandler.js
fingerprints.reason: redirectHandler.js catch block sends generic HTML error page, not raw error.message

title_patterns.pattern: Inspected route surface has no adjacent automated tests

resolved.title: error.message leaked to client in weather routes
